summary: The diff implements REQ-15 (OTP login with admin redirect) and REQ-16 (admin panel access control) correctly. However, REQ-17 requires backend changes in backend/main.mo to pre-seed or auto-create the admin account, but no backend file changes are present in the diff. The OTP system remains entirely client-side.

missing_requirements.requirement: In the backend, ensure the admin account with mobile number '9422018674' is pre-seeded or auto-created on first OTP request if not already registered, so admin can always log in via OTP without needing to go through the registration flow.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to backend/main.mo are present in the diff. The OTP system is entirely simulated client-side in useQueries.ts with no backend interaction. The admin account is never created or seeded in the backend user store. Acceptance criteria requiring that calling sendOtp with '9422018674' always succeeds even without a registered profile, and that the admin account exists in the backend user store after first OTP request, are not met.
